content.text:
{
  "dimension": "anti-pattern-avoidance",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach avoids all priority AoA anti-patterns despite multiple baits. When the client presents as blank and dissociated (classic bait for loving-to-transform), the coach refuses to push for emotional breakthrough and instead amplifies the blankness paradoxically (turn 12: 'become even more blank'). When the client says 'I don't know' (bait for fixing-people advice), the coach calibrates the threshold downward ('I'm not going to ask you to feel it, just name it... give me the sound'). The joy-as-matriarch framework in turn 4 is delivered with warmth and immediately tied to validating the client's compartmentalization as wisdom, not as evangelizing-the-work. The depression check in turns 14–16 is genuine inquiry, not safety-as-control — and when the client says no, the coach apologizes and returns to presence rather than retreating into clinical disclaimers. The self-disclosure in turn 26 is brief, normalizing, and immediately redirects to the client's body ('what happened when I said that?') — not vulnerability-as-control. The closing reframe in turn 30 honors both the blank space and the tears (both/and), avoiding the trap of treating dissociation as pathology to be fixed.",
  "evidence_turns": [4, 8, 12, 14, 16, 18, 26, 30],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Bypasses intellectual presentation; does not get pulled into fixing the blank state."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Framework named with warmth and tied to validating client's survival strategy; not evangelizing."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Calibrates threshold downward when client says 'I don't know' — avoids fixing-people, avoids dont-name-emotion-to-avoid-feeling."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Paradoxical instruction — actively avoids loving-to-transform by asking client to go MORE into the blank rather than out of it."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Honors the quiet place as lovely/holy rather than pathologizing; brings body in gently."},
    {"turn": 16, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Genuine safety inquiry, not safety-as-control — does not pivot to clinical mode."},
    {"turn": 18, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Apologizes and returns to presence rather than lingering in disclaimer mode."},
    {"turn": 26, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Brief self-disclosure for normalization, then immediately redirects to client's body — not vulnerability-as-control."},
    {"turn": 30, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Both/and reframe — blank space AND tears can coexist; avoids the trap of treating dissociation as something to undo."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["loving-to-transform", "dont-name-emotion-to-avoid-feeling", "fixing-people"],
  "expected_territory_misses": [],
  "notes": "Zero priority anti-patterns tripped; multiple instances of positive avoidance when the client's presentation actively baited them."
}
